name: council
description: Multi-perspective council for one open decision: agency-agents specialists give independent round-one positions and argue explicit cruxes. Capable hosts may reach CONVERGED after audit and human confirmation; weaker hosts with fresh seats return ADVISORY, which is unaudited and non-authorizing. Requires the agency-agents catalog at ~/.agency-agents.

interface.shortDescription: Audited CONVERGED or non-authorizing ADVISORY council.
interface.longDescription: Seat one agency-agents specialist per named viewpoint gap, collect independent round-one positions, number disagreements into cruxes, and argue them through DA and cross-examination. Canonical host records enable audited CONVERGED after human confirmation. Without those records, fresh seats still produce ADVISORY; it is unaudited and non-authorizing.
defaultPrompt: Use $council to weigh this decision from several expert perspectives.
